# services.goupile

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.goupile`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.goupile.configFile` | `absolute path` | The configuration file to be passed to goupile server. By default the configuration file is created from `services.goupile.settings`. |
| `services.goupile.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Goupile server. |
| `services.goupile.enableSandbox` | `boolean` | Enable the sandbox option. |
| `services.goupile.hostName` | `string` | Nginx service name for goupile service. |
| `services.goupile.package` | `package` | The goupile package to use. |
| `services.goupile.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | The options for `systemd.services.goupile` in ini format. The configuration options available can be found here https://github.com/Koromix/rygel/blob/goupile/3.11.1/src/goupile/server/admin.cc#L41 |
| `services.goupile.settings.Data.RootDirectory` | `string` | Goupile's data directory. |
| `services.goupile.settings.HTTP.Port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port goupile runs on |
